title: KARBAG 10 PCS Artificial Christmas Glitter Leaves, 10.6 Inch Fake Foliage Pine Stems Picks Artificial Silver Leaves Glitter Picks for Christmas Tree DIY Garland Wreath Home Garden Decoration
features: 🎄【Artificial Glitter Branches Leaves】🎄You will receive 10 pieces of artificial Christmas pine needles, these artificial Christmas glitter leaves are designed to add a touch of sparkle and elegance to your holiday decorations. Each branch has carefully crafted leaves, and the shimmering silver coating on the leaves adds to the festive atmosphere, creating a stunning visual effect when light hits the leaves.

🎄【Reliable Durable Materials】🎄KARBAG glittery leaves are made of high-quality plastic, metal wire, and glitter, ensuring they'll last for many holidays to come. The glitter coating adheres firmly to the leaves, preventing them from peeling and ensuring long-lasting glitter. The wire can be folded and bent so the decorative item can be adapted to your needs. Over time, these Artificial Christmas branches will maintain their attractiveness and integrity.

🎄【Suitable Size】🎄These silver Christmas leaves are designed to be just the right size, measuring 27 x 13 cm/ 10.6 x 5.1 inches, the right size makes them look like real plants, making them versatile for decorative purposes. Whether you're looking to decorate your Christmas tree, create a garland, garland, or other holiday arrangement, these leaves are just the right size to add a touch of sparkling beauty.

🎄【Lifelike Appearance & Glitter Design】🎄One of the distinguishing features of these christmas tree picks is their lifelike appearance. The leaves are covered with bright silver glitter powder, which looks more lush and shiny, and also adds a charm and luster to the branches, allowing you to create a dreamy Christmas atmosphere. The glitter design adds a touch of glamor and sophistication, making these leaves stand out and attract attention.

🎄【Create Vivid Holiday Atmosphere】🎄KARBAG Artificial Christmas Tree Pine Leaves are perfect for Christmas decorations such as Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, snowmen, garlands, Christmas centerpieces, seasonal flower arrangements, holiday table displays, winter wedding bouquets, wedding floral decorations, or to decorate holiday gift wrapping. The combination of lifelike appearance and sparkling design creates a glamorous atmosphere that captures the essence of the festival.
description: Product Description Looking to add a touch of sparkle and elegance to your Christmas tree this holiday season? KARBAG 10 Pcs Christmas Glitter Artificial Pine Needles! ---The perfect addition to any Christmas tree, adding a festive touch while beautifully catching the light. PREMIUM MATERIAL These fake floral twig picks are made of high quality plastic and inside the stem is iron wire. The plastic pine needles are covered with a glittery coating with vibrant color and shining surface. The glitter adds a stunning shimmer, transforming your tree into a dazzling spectacle that will captivate everyone's attention. LIFELIKE APPEARANCE Our high-quality Faux Christmas Tree Branches offer the perfect solution for those seeking easy yet stunning festive decorations. No more struggling with messy, shedding real pine needles! These artificial leaves are carefully constructed to provide a lifelike appearance, ensuring the longevity of your decorations year after year. GLITTER CHRISTMAS TREE DECORATIONS Decorating your Christmas tree has never been more effortless! Simply attach these Glitter Picks to your tree branches to instantly transform your tree into a glamorous centerpiece. The vibrant silver glitter adds a dazzling touch to any traditional or modern holiday theme, creating a festive ambiance in your home. DECORATE YOUR HOUSE Besides their obvious use on Christmas trees, these glitter picks can also be utilized in various other creative ways. With their flexible stems, you can easily bend and shape them to fit wreaths, centerpieces, candle displays, or any other craft project you have in mind. Let your imagination run wild and use these versatile glitter branches to add a festive touch throughout your home. At KARBAG, we are committed to providing our customers with the highest quality holiday decorations. Our Artificial Christmas Glitter Leaves are no exception. The sliver glitter and lifelike needles are attractively designed, ensuring that your tree will become the star of your holiday decor.
